description: Bootstrap, organize, or archive project tracking docs. Use when: "archive this project", "bootstrap from plan", "set up project tracking", "clean up project docs", "update INDEX", "reorganize docs/projects/", "歸檔這個專案", "建專案", "整理專案文件", project is done and merged — needs cleanup. Not for: creating plans (→ writing-plans), choosing what to work on (→ next), or running quality gates (→ quality-pipeline).

results.query: bootstrap a new project from the plan in docs/plans/2026-03-21-allowance-distribution-engine.md — create the directory structure, README, and update the index
the allowance engine feature is done and merged. archive the project — move docs, update INDEX, mark it completed.
set up the project tracking for the notification system feature — directory, README with phases, INDEX entry, feature branch
the go-live-gap-closure branch is merged to develop. clean up the project docs and archive everything.
I need to reorganize the docs/projects/ directory — some old projects are still marked in-progress but they were finished weeks ago
what should I work on next? scan all open projects and backlog.
run tests and code review before I merge this feature branch
dispatch 3 parallel agents to work on the schema migration, type generation, and frontend updates simultaneously
record the advisory lock gotcha in knowledge so future sessions know about it
create a plan for migrating the notification system from polling to SSE. Include architecture, phases, and risks.
